WebhookConfig.title: WebhookConfig
WebhookConfig.description: Global bridge configurations managed exclusively by the terminal admin.

Signal.title: Signal
Signal.description: A real-time market alert received via the bridge, shared with all users.

assetType.description: The type of asset (e.g., CRYPTO, FOREX, STOCKS, INDICES).

exchange.description: The exchange for the asset (e.g., BINANCE, NSE, CRYPTO).

price.description: The price at which the alert was triggered.

stopLoss.description: Internal invalidation level. Not shown to users.

currentPrice.description: The most recent price recorded by the server cron.

timeframe.description: The timeframe of the signal (e.g. 1, 5, 15, 60, D)

maxUpsidePrice.description: The best price achieved since the alert.

maxDrawdownPrice.description: The worst price reached since the alert.

SystemLog.title: SystemLog
SystemLog.description: Technical logs for debugging webhook ingestion and system events.

/webhooks/{webhookId}.description: Global bridge configurations managed exclusively by hello@tezterminal.com.

/signals/{signalId}.description: The real-time global feed of market alerts consumed by all traders.
